title: P0-F deliverable hardening baseline
purpose: Provide a minimal but executable before-and-after baseline for deliverable bundle readability, ranking discipline, and artifact-readiness hardening without turning benchmark scaffolding into a new platform.
update_policy: Only update this manifest when the shipped scope for P0-F changes.
Do not overwrite historical QA evidence; benchmark scaffold records complement docs/16_qa_matrix.md.
Prefer revising seed cases over expanding into a full scoring platform during P0-F.

cases.title: Clause bundle density control
cases.description: Deliverable-oriented contract review where clause and obligation bundles can become too dense without ranking and summary discipline.
cases.decision_context_summary: Need a contract-risk deliverable that keeps high-signal clauses and obligations readable, ranks the most important members first, and keeps publish/export artifacts clean before circulation.

cases.title: Process issue bundle density control
cases.description: Deliverable-oriented operations review where process issue bundles need ranking, preview discipline, and artifact-safe summary output.
cases.decision_context_summary: Need an operations remediation deliverable that keeps process bottlenecks, dependency blocks, and control gaps readable, ranks the highest-signal issues first, and exports a stable support-bundle summary.
source_mix_summary: owner mapping and escalation log excerpt
